story.text:
# 💡 the Sovereign Lattice ℒ
**concept** · shared · knowledge

ℒ = ℤ/64ℤ — the one 64-vertex sovereignty lattice every surface projects: 96 holographic boundary edges, strata as Pascal rows 0–6, ⚔️ neg(x)=(64−x) mod 64 · 🧙 bnot(x)=63−x · succ = neg∘bnot (the proven identity). /sigil, /lattice, /star, /skye, /city, and spellweb are readings of this one object.
> *Six dimensions, one lattice. Every surface is a way of looking.*

## Edges in

- [[the Projection Ladder]] *references* →
- [[the Swordsman's Key (mitchuski/star)]] *references* →
